## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start the server with `...`
2. Navigate to `...`
3. Click on `...`
4. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, log output, or screenshots if applicable.

- **Browser** (if UI-related): (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
